title: buildah run --hostname, seems to be broken
body:
`buildah run --hostname` does not work with the current version.

Check out this question for more information,

https://unix.stackexchange.com/questions/619205/how-does-hostname-work-with-buildah-run

comments.body:
Seems to be working in buildah-1.19.*

 buildah run --hostname dan alpine-working-container hostname
dan
